title: Me
subtitle: Change how the app looks and feels.

notification.onAt: On · We'll remind you at {{hour}}:00 on watering days
notification.deniedHint: Off · Enable it in your device settings to receive reminders
notification.offHint: Off · Turn it on so you never miss a watering day

place.sourcePrompt: How should we get the location used for weather-based tips?
place.sourceNone: Not set · Reflects indoor conditions only
place.weatherUnavailable: We couldn't fetch weather data yet. Tap refresh to try again.

locations.empty: No spaces yet. Add one below.
locations.removeInUse: {{n}} plants are in this space. If you delete it, the plants stay but their space info is cleared. This can't be undone.
locations.removeConfirm: Delete this for sure? This can't be undone.

account.deleteMessage:
Your plants and all care records and photos will be permanently deleted.
This can't be undone.
account.deleteFinalMessage: This is your last chance. There's no recovery after deletion.

legal.openFailedMessage: Something went wrong opening the document. Please try again in a moment.

locationForm.nameRequiredMessage: Please enter a name for the space.
locationForm.duplicateMessage: A space with the same name already exists.
